{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = cloudbell bush
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[cloudbell bush]] is a type of plant found in [[Eithan]]'s garden.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
